heading: Exclusive right to name
label: 50305 Exclusive right to name
text: The corporation and its State and local subdivisions have the exclusive right to use the name “Disabled American Veterans”.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5030536:90h., ; , .June 17, 1932, ch. 268, § 847 Stat. 321July 15, 1942, ch. 505, § 556 Stat. 660The words “sole”, “have and”, and “in carrying out its purposes” are omitted as unnecessary.
